prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜排名近年稳定在第 22 名（2021 年第 21 名），属于全国顶尖高校行列，对高分考生吸引力持续强劲；2026 年声誉评价为偏负面（学伴事件遗留舆情）；抖音综合热度排名第 20、评价为高热，短视频曝光量大，报考关注度较高；历史投档异常方面，2022 年陕西断档、2023 年新闻传播专业位次下降 6414 位、2024 年四川调档线下降 63 分，均属高关注信号，但负面舆情对报考心理有双向影响；数学 A+、中国语言文学 A、外国语言文学 A、控制科学与工程 A、马克思主义理论 A、临床医学 A-、法学 A-、物理学 A-、生物学 A-、电气工程 A-、药学 A-、软件工程 A- 等 19 个 A- 及以上学科，学科实力雄厚，对考生有较强吸引力。

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次大幅后移的基准、2026 年扩招约 22.8% 的缓解效应、甘肃省物理类考生增长约 20% 的竞争加剧、抖音高热关注度与偏负面声誉的博弈，以及优势学科对考生的持续吸引力，预计 2026 年最低位次在 13824 名基础上小幅上移（竞争略加剧），预测最低位次约 14000 名，区间 13500–14500 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 3304→3556→3275→3939→12163. From 2021 to 2024, rankings fluctuated narrowly within the 3300–4000 range, but in 2025 there was a significant drop (about 8224 places lower than 2024), mainly due to adjustments in enrollment major structure and changes in candidates' application psychology in that year. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 12163. The university's enrollment plan in Gansu for science/physics category: 99 in 2021, 104 in 2022, 109 in 2023, 111 in 2024, 101 in 2025. In 2026, the physics category plan is 103, and the medical category plan is 21 (medical students are also physics category candidates), totaling about 124, an increase of about 22.8% compared to 2025, which theoretically eases competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking has been stable at 22nd in recent years (21st in 2021), belonging to the top-tier universities nationwide, with strong and sustained appeal to high-scoring candidates. In 2026, reputation evaluation is slightly negative (lingering negative public opinion from the 'study buddy' incident). Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 20th, rated as high popularity, with high short video exposure and considerable application attention. Historical admission anomalies: in 2022, a gap in Shaanxi; in 2023, the journalism and communication major ranking dropped by 6414 places; in 2024, the admission line in Sichuan dropped by 63 points, all high-attention signals, but negative public opinion has a bidirectional impact on application psychology. With 19 A- or above disciplines including Mathematics A+, Chinese Language and Literature A, Foreign Languages and Literature A, Control Science and Engineering A, Marxist Theory A, Clinical Medicine A-, Law A-, Physics A-, Biology A-, Electrical Engineering A-, Pharmacy A-, Software Engineering A-, the university has strong academic strength, attracting candidates significantly.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering and automation, clinical medicine, etc., are all highly recommended popular majors, highly matching Shandong University's advantageous disciplines. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Gansu is about 218,700 (an increase of about 21.6% from 179,817 in 2025). Estimating physics category proportion at about 67% in recent years, the number of physics category candidates in 2026 is about 146,000, an increase of about 20% from 121,000 in 2025, intensifying competition. In 2025, the physics category undergraduate batch line was 374 points, special type line 475 points, in 2026. Shandong University is located in Shandong Province, recruiting across provinces in Gansu. The university's enrollment proportion in Gansu is about 0.5%–0.8% (referring to enrollment_summary data), a normal cross-province ratio, with no obvious regional preference deviation.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline of a significant ranking drop in 2025, the easing effect of about 22.8% enrollment expansion in 2026, the intensified competition from about 20% growth in physics category candidates in Gansu, the game between high Douyin attention and slightly negative reputation, and the sustained appeal of advantageous disciplines to candidates, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly increase from 13824 (competition slightly intensifies), with a predicted minimum ranking of about 14000, range 13500–14500.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 13500–14500, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors (Mathematics, Computer Science) as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safe backup. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 13000), you can focus on Tier 1 and Mathematics. If your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (around 14500), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 2 majors such as Electronic Information, Automation, and Electrical Engineering, with Tier 3 as backup.

专业热度与地域.text: Law recommended/differentiated wait-and-see, Chinese Language/Chinese recommended, Journalism and Communication clearly discouraged, highly related to Shandong University's liberal arts enrollment majors (Law, Chinese Language and Literature, Journalism and Communication, Business Administration, etc.); the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Gansu in 2026 is about 218,700, estimated at about 33% history category proportion in recent years, the 2026 history category candidates are about 73,000, an increase of about 25% compared to 58,000 in 2025, with expanded candidate scale intensifying competition; the 2025 history category undergraduate batch line is 412 points, special type 500 points, 2026; Shandong University is located in Shandong Province, cross-province enrollment in Gansu; the university's liberal arts enrollment proportion in Gansu is about 0.3%–0.5%, a normal cross-province ratio.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 山东大学在甘肃省医学类单独招生批次中，2021年最低录取位次为3304名（计划15人），2022年3448名（计划12人），2023年3034名（计划14人），2024年因新高考改革首年、 护理学专业单独拉低整体位次至12442名（计划18人），2025年位次回升至5134名（计划13人）。2026年医学类招生计划大幅扩招至21人，较2025年增加8人，增幅约61.5%，为近 五年最高计划数。扩招意味着录取名额显著增加，在报考热度不变或略增的情况下，最低录取位次数字预计将较2025年有所增大（即更难进入）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 山东大学是教育部直属全国重点大学，位列国家985工程、211工程及双一流A类建设高校，综合实力位居全国前列。其医学学科历史悠久，齐鲁医学品牌在国内享有极高声誉，临 床医学、口腔医学等专业长期处于国内领先水平，对高分考生具有强大吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业近年来报考热度持续攀升，临床医学（5+3一体化、五年制）及齐鲁医学堂等高端培养项目尤其受到顶尖考生追捧。山东大学位于山东省济南市，作为东部沿海省会城 市，对甘肃省考生具有较强的地域吸引力。甘肃省内医学类招生规模整体有限，山东大学医学类在甘投放计划虽有所增加，但竞争格局依然较为激烈。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合考量2026年医学类大幅扩招61.5%的供给端变化，以及医学专业持续高热度的需求端因素，采用M3供需弹性模型计算得出基准位次7030名，结合近年医学位次从2024年低位快 速回升至5134名的趋势，进行小幅回调修正。预测2026年山东大学在甘肃省医学类最低录取位次约为7000名，波动区间为6790至7210名。该位次较2025年有所增大，反映扩招带来 的竞争加剧效应。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: In the separate medical enrollment batch of Shandong University in Gansu Province, the minimum admission ranking in 2021 was 3304 (planned 15 students), in 2022 it was 3448 (planned 12 students), in 2023 it was 3034 (planned 14 students), in 2024 due to the first year of the new college entrance examination reform and the separate lowering of the overall ranking by the nursing major to 12442 (planned 18 students), and in 2025 the ranking rebounded to 5134 (planned 13 students). In 2026, the medical enrollment plan significantly expanded to 21 students, an increase of 8 students compared to 2025, an increase of about 61.5%, the highest planned number in the past five years. Expansion means a significant increase in admission slots. Under the condition that the application heat remains unchanged or slightly increases, the minimum admission ranking number is expected to increase compared to 2025 (i.e., harder to enter).

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shandong University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, listed among the national 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class A-class construction universities, with comprehensive strength ranking among the top in the country. Its medical disciplines have a long history, and the Qilu Medicine brand enjoys a very high reputation in China. Clinical medicine, stomatology, and other majors have long been at the leading level in the country, attracting high-scoring candidates strongly.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical majors has continued to rise. High-end training programs such as clinical medicine (5+3 integrated, five-year) and Qilu Medical College are particularly sought after by top candidates. Shandong University is located in Jinan, Shandong Province, an eastern coastal provincial capital city, which has a strong regional attraction for candidates from Gansu Province. The overall scale of medical enrollment within Gansu Province is limited. Although the number of medical slots offered by Shandong University in Gansu has increased, the competition pattern remains relatively intense.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Comprehensively considering the supply-side change of a significant 61.5% expansion in medical enrollment in 2026 and the demand-side factor of persistently high popularity of medical majors, using the M3 supply-demand elasticity model, the baseline ranking is calculated to be 7030. Combined with the trend of medical rankings rapidly rebounding from a low in 2024 to 5134 in recent years, a slight downward adjustment correction is made. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Shandong University's medical category in Gansu Province in 2026 will be approximately 7000, with a fluctuation range of 6790 to 7210. This ranking is larger than that of 2025, reflecting the intensified competition effect brought by the expansion.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (Qilu Medical College Innovation Experimental Class)
- Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated)
- Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated, Pediatrics Direction)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Pharmacy (Pharmacy, Clinical Pharmacy (Five-Year))
- Preventive Medicine (Five-Year)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to take Tier 2 Clinical Medicine (Five-Year) as the main direction, Tier 1 high-end clinical medicine programs as a sprint, and Tier 3 Pharmacy and Preventive Medicine as a safe backup.
